# 3 Card Poker Malaysia

> Free online poker game for Malaysian players. No download, no registration. Play instantly in your browser.

## About This Game

3 Card Poker Malaysia is a free browser-based poker game designed for Malaysian players.

- **Live Game**: https://johmark2026-svg.github.io/3-card-poker-malaysia-guide/
- **Strategy Guide**: https://www.0467hgj.com/3-card-poker-malaysia-guide/3-card-poker-malaysia-guide.html
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/johmark2026-svg/3-card-poker-malaysia-guide

## How to Play

Add chips and DEAL. Click cards to HOLD them, then DRAW. Best hand wins based on Video Poker payouts.

## Technical Details

- **Technology**: HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks)
- **Compatibility**: All modern browsers, mobile and desktop
- **Language**: English (Malaysian context)
- **License**: MIT

HGJ Poker provides free casino game guides and strategy resources for Malaysian players. Visit https://www.0467hgj.com for more guides.
